rule1: Double King is played with the same 6 penalty and 4 positive game types as regular King
rule2: Each game type can be played 2 times in any order you choose
rule3: For 4 players: 6 penalty games × 2 + 4 positive games × 2 = 20 rounds total
rule4: For 3 players: 6 penalty games × 2 + 3 positive games × 2 = 18 rounds total
rule5: Select which game you want to play before entering scores
rule6: Completed games are marked with a checkmark and cannot be selected
rule7: Scoring follows the same rules as regular King
rule8: Penalty games count negative points, positive games count positive points
rule9: The player with the highest total score after all rounds wins
